hero.title: 中国AI大模型词元调用量连续八周稳居全球首位
hero.title_en: China's AI LLM Token Usage Ranks First Globally for 8 Consecutive Weeks
hero.summary: OpenRouter数据显示，6月15日至21日当周，中国AI大模型周调用量达18.81万亿词元，环比增长2.12%，连续八周稳居全球首位，超过美国5.76万亿词元的3.3倍。
hero.summary_en: OpenRouter data shows China's AI LLM weekly token usage reached 18.81 trillion in the week of June 15-21, up 2.12% week-over-week, ranking first globally for 8 consecutive weeks, over 3.3 times that of the US at 5.76 trillion.

articles.title: 中国AI大模型词元调用量连续八周稳居全球首位
articles.title_en: China's AI LLM Token Usage Ranks First Globally for 8 Consecutive Weeks
articles.summary: OpenRouter数据显示，6月15日至21日当周，中国AI大模型周调用量达18.81万亿词元，环比增长2.12%，连续八周稳居全球首位，超过美国5.76万亿词元的3.3倍。
articles.summary_en: OpenRouter data shows China's AI LLM weekly token usage reached 18.81 trillion in the week of June 15-21, up 2.12% week-over-week, ranking first globally for 8 consecutive weeks, over 3.3 times that of the US at 5.76 trillion.
articles.content: OpenRouter最新监测数据显示，6月15日至21日当周，全球AI大模型总调用量达46.7万亿词元，连续九周保持上涨态势。其中，中国AI大模型周调用量达18.81万亿词元，环比增长2.12%，连续八周稳居全球首位。相比之下，美国AI大模型周调用量为5.76万亿词元，环比增长仅0.70%。中国市场不仅在绝对量上是美国的3.3倍，增长速度也接近美国的3倍。八周的持续领跑，彻底确立了中国在全球AI应用落地领域的核心地位。DeepSeek-V4-Flash连续五周位居全球调用量榜首，小米MiMo-V2.5升至第二位，国产大模型在前十中占据六席。
articles.content_en: OpenRouter's latest monitoring data shows global AI LLM total token usage reached 46.7 trillion in the week of June 15-21, maintaining growth for nine consecutive weeks. China's AI LLM weekly token usage reached 18.81 trillion, up 2.12% week-over-week, ranking first globally for 8 consecutive weeks. In contrast, US AI LLM weekly token usage was 5.76 trillion, with only 0.70% week-over-week growth. China's market is not only 3.3 times that of the US in absolute volume, but its growth rate is nearly 3 times that of the US. DeepSeek-V4-Flash topped global usage for five consecutive weeks, Xiaomi's MiMo-V2.5 rose to second place, and Chinese LLMs occupied six of the top ten positions.
key_points: 中国AI大模型周调用量18.81万亿词元，连续八周全球第一
中国调用量是美国的3.3倍，增速接近3倍
DeepSeek-V4-Flash连续五周居全球调用量榜首
小米MiMo-V2.5升至全球第二
全球总调用量46.7万亿词元，连续九周上涨
key_points_en: China's AI LLM weekly usage reached 18.81 trillion tokens, ranking first globally for 8 weeks
China's usage is 3.3x that of the US, growth rate nearly 3x
DeepSeek-V4-Flash topped global usage for 5 consecutive weeks
Xiaomi MiMo-V2.5 rose to 2nd globally
Global total usage at 46.7 trillion tokens, rising for 9 consecutive weeks

articles.title: 火山引擎发布豆包大模型2.1 Pro，日均Tokens突破180万亿
articles.title_en: Volcano Engine Releases Doubao LLM 2.1 Pro, Daily Tokens Exceed 180 Trillion
articles.summary: 火山引擎正式发布豆包大模型2.1 Pro版本，日均Tokens调用量突破180万亿，较上一版本提升显著。新版本在推理能力和多模态理解方面均有大幅提升。
articles.summary_en: Volcano Engine officially released Doubao LLM 2.1 Pro, with daily token usage exceeding 180 trillion, a significant increase from the previous version. The new version shows substantial improvements in reasoning and multimodal understanding.
articles.content: 火山引擎在2026火山引擎FORCE原动力大会上正式发布豆包大模型2.1 Pro版本。数据显示，豆包大模型日均Tokens调用量已突破180万亿，较去年增长数十倍，标志着国产大模型正式跨越「生产级质变点」。新版本在代码生成、数学推理、长文本理解等核心能力上均有显著提升，特别是Agent能力方面新增了工具调用、多步骤规划和跨应用协作三项核心能力。火山引擎还同步推出了豆包2.1 Pro的轻量版和标准版，满足不同场景的算力需求。价格方面，Pro版输入每百万token仅4元，输出每百万token16元，极具性价比。
articles.content_en: Volcano Engine officially released Doubao LLM 2.1 Pro at the 2026 Volcano Engine FORCE conference. Data shows Doubao's daily token usage has exceeded 180 trillion, growing dozens of times compared to last year, marking Chinese LLMs crossing the 'production-grade tipping point.' The new version shows significant improvements in code generation, mathematical reasoning, and long-text understanding, with three new Agent capabilities: tool calling, multi-step planning, and cross-application collaboration. Volcano Engine also launched lightweight and standard versions. Pricing is highly competitive at 4 yuan per million input tokens and 16 yuan per million output tokens for the Pro version.
key_points: 豆包2.1 Pro日均Tokens突破180万亿
新增三项Agent核心能力
推理能力和多模态理解大幅提升
Pro版定价极具性价比
标志国产大模型跨越生产级质变点
key_points_en: Doubao 2.1 Pro daily tokens exceed 180 trillion
Three new Agent capabilities added
Significant improvements in reasoning and multimodal understanding
Pro version pricing highly competitive
Marks Chinese LLMs crossing the production-grade tipping point

articles.title: DeepSeek完成510亿元首轮融资，估值逼近4000亿
articles.title_en: DeepSeek Completes 51 Billion Yuan First Funding Round, Valuation Approaches 400 Billion
articles.summary: DeepSeek完成首轮融资510亿元人民币，投后估值逼近4000亿元。腾讯领投约100亿元，宁德时代出资50亿元，创始人梁文锋个人出资约28亿元保持控制权。
articles.summary_en: DeepSeek completed its first funding round of 51 billion yuan, with post-investment valuation approaching 400 billion yuan. Tencent led with approximately 10 billion yuan, CATL contributed 5 billion yuan, and founder Liang Wenfeng personally invested about 2.8 billion yuan to maintain control.
articles.content: DeepSeek完成成立以来首轮外部融资，总金额超过510亿元人民币，投后估值达520-590亿美元区间。本轮融资由腾讯领投约100亿元，宁德时代出资50亿元，网易、京东各30亿元。创始人梁文锋个人出资约28亿元，通过特殊的股权结构设计确保了绝对控制权——外部投资者仅获经济权益而无投票权。这是中国AI史上最大单轮融资，估值逻辑对标Anthropic，达国际一线水平。资金将主要用于算力基础设施建设和顶尖人才招募，DeepSeek计划在2026年底前将算力规模扩大3倍。
articles.content_en: DeepSeek completed its first external funding round, totaling over 51 billion yuan, with post-investment valuation in the $52-59 billion range. Tencent led with approximately 10 billion yuan, CATL contributed 5 billion yuan, and NetEase and JD.com each contributed 3 billion yuan. Founder Liang Wenfeng personally invested about 2.8 billion yuan, maintaining absolute control through a special equity structure where external investors only receive economic rights without voting rights. This is the largest single funding round in Chinese AI history, with valuation logic benchmarked against Anthropic at international top-tier levels. Funds will primarily be used for computing infrastructure and talent recruitment, with plans to triple computing capacity by end of 2026.
key_points: DeepSeek首轮融资510亿元，中国AI史上最大
腾讯领投100亿元，宁德时代50亿元
梁文锋通过特殊股权结构保持绝对控制权
投后估值520-590亿美元，对标Anthropic
资金将用于算力建设3倍扩容和人才招募
key_points_en: DeepSeek's first round of 51 billion yuan, largest in Chinese AI history
Tencent led with 10 billion yuan, CATL with 5 billion yuan
Liang Wenfeng maintains absolute control through special equity structure
Post-investment valuation $52-59 billion, benchmarked against Anthropic
Funds for 3x computing expansion and talent recruitment

articles.title: 影眸科技完成数亿元新一轮融资
articles.title_en: Yingmou Technology Completes Hundreds of Millions Yuan New Funding Round
articles.summary: AI视觉技术公司影眸科技完成数亿元新一轮融资，公司专注于AI生成3D数字人技术，已在影视、游戏、虚拟直播等领域实现商业化落地。
articles.summary_en: AI vision technology company Yingmou Technology completed a new funding round of hundreds of millions of yuan, focusing on AI-generated 3D digital human technology with commercial applications in film, gaming, and virtual live streaming.
articles.content: AI视觉技术公司影眸科技宣布完成数亿元新一轮融资。该公司专注于AI生成3D数字人技术，其核心产品可实现从单张照片生成高精度3D数字人模型，在影视制作、游戏开发、虚拟直播等领域已实现商业化落地。本轮融资将用于技术研发升级和市场拓展，特别是在实时交互3D数字人领域的技术突破。影眸科技的技术已在多个头部影视项目中应用，其生成的数字人质量已接近真人水平，显著降低了3D内容制作成本和时间。
articles.content_en: AI vision technology company Yingmou Technology announced completing a new funding round of hundreds of millions of yuan. The company focuses on AI-generated 3D digital human technology, with its core product capable of generating high-precision 3D digital human models from a single photo, achieving commercial applications in film production, game development, and virtual live streaming. The funding will be used for R&D upgrades and market expansion, particularly in real-time interactive 3D digital human technology breakthroughs. Yingmou's technology has been applied in multiple top-tier film projects, with digital human quality approaching real-person levels, significantly reducing 3D content production costs and time.

专注AI生成3D数字人技术
已在影视、游戏、虚拟直播实现商业化
从单张照片生成高精度3D数字人
数字人质量接近真人水平

Focuses on AI-generated 3D digital human technology
Commercialized in film, gaming, and virtual live streaming
Generates high-precision 3D digital humans from single photo
Digital human quality approaching real-person levels

articles.title: 正行创新完成近亿美元天使轮系列融资
articles.title_en: Zhengxing Innovation Completes Nearly 100 Million USD Angel Round Series Funding
articles.summary: AI基础设施初创公司正行创新完成近亿美元天使轮系列融资，专注于AI推理芯片和边缘计算解决方案，旨在为国产AI算力提供底层支撑。
articles.summary_en: AI infrastructure startup Zhengxing Innovation completed nearly 100 million USD in angel round series funding, focusing on AI inference chips and edge computing solutions, aiming to provide foundational support for domestic AI computing power.
articles.content: AI基础设施初创公司正行创新宣布完成近亿美元天使轮系列融资。该公司专注于AI推理芯片和边缘计算解决方案的研发，旨在为国产AI算力提供底层支撑。本轮融资由多家头部机构联合投资，资金将用于芯片流片、团队扩建和产品商业化。正行创新的核心团队来自英伟达、华为海思等头部芯片企业，拥有丰富的AI芯片设计经验。在当前国产AI芯片替代的大趋势下，正行创新定位差异化竞争，聚焦推理侧而非训练侧，以更高性价比满足企业级AI部署需求。
articles.content_en: AI infrastructure startup Zhengxing Innovation announced completing nearly 100 million USD in angel round series funding. The company focuses on R&D of AI inference chips and edge computing solutions, aiming to provide foundational support for domestic AI computing power. The funding was jointly invested by multiple top-tier institutions and will be used for chip tape-out, team expansion, and product commercialization. The core team comes from NVIDIA, HiSilicon, and other leading chip companies with rich AI chip design experience. Under the trend of domestic AI chip substitution, Zhengxing Innovation positions itself for differentiated competition, focusing on inference rather than training, offering better cost-effectiveness for enterprise AI deployment.
key_points: 正行创新完成近亿美元天使轮融资
专注AI推理芯片和边缘计算
核心团队来自英伟达、华为海思
聚焦推理侧差异化竞争
资金用于芯片流片和商业化
key_points_en: Zhengxing Innovation completes nearly 100M USD angel round
Focuses on AI inference chips and edge computing
Core team from NVIDIA and HiSilicon
Differentiated competition focusing on inference side
Funds for chip tape-out and commercialization

articles.title: OpenAI发布GPT-5.5-Cyber满血版，强化网络安全能力
articles.title_en: OpenAI Releases GPT-5.5-Cyber Full Version, Strengthening Cybersecurity Capabilities
articles.summary: OpenAI发布GPT-5.5-Cyber满血版，专为网络安全场景优化的模型版本，在漏洞检测、威胁分析和安全代码审计方面表现突出，较标准版提升40%以上。
articles.summary_en: OpenAI released GPT-5.5-Cyber full version, a model specifically optimized for cybersecurity scenarios, excelling in vulnerability detection, threat analysis, and secure code auditing, with over 40% improvement compared to the standard version.
articles.content: OpenAI正式发布GPT-5.5-Cyber满血版，这是GPT系列首个专为网络安全场景深度优化的模型版本。该模型在漏洞检测、威胁情报分析、安全代码审计和攻击模拟等核心安全任务上表现突出，较标准版GPT-5.5提升40%以上。GPT-5.5-Cyber支持对代码仓库进行全量安全扫描，可自动识别OWASP Top 10漏洞并给出修复建议，同时具备实时威胁情报分析能力。OpenAI表示，该模型已与多家安全厂商合作测试，预计将显著提升企业安全运营效率。定价方面，Cyber版本较标准版溢价30%。
articles.content_en: OpenAI officially released GPT-5.5-Cyber full version, the first GPT model deeply optimized for cybersecurity scenarios. The model excels in vulnerability detection, threat intelligence analysis, secure code auditing, and attack simulation, showing over 40% improvement compared to the standard GPT-5.5. GPT-5.5-Cyber supports full security scanning of code repositories, automatically identifying OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities with remediation suggestions, and has real-time threat intelligence analysis capabilities. OpenAI stated the model has been tested with multiple security vendors and is expected to significantly improve enterprise security operations efficiency. Pricing is 30% premium over the standard version.
key_points: GPT-5.5-Cyber是首个网络安全专优化模型
漏洞检测和安全审计能力提升40%以上
支持OWASP Top 10漏洞自动识别和修复
已与多家安全厂商合作测试
定价较标准版溢价30%
key_points_en: GPT-5.5-Cyber is the first cybersecurity-optimized model
Vulnerability detection and security auditing improved 40%+
Supports automatic OWASP Top 10 identification and remediation
Tested with multiple security vendors
Priced at 30% premium over standard version

articles.title: Anthropic秘密提交IPO，估值达9650亿美元
articles.title_en: Anthropic Secretly Files for IPO, Valuation Reaches 965 Billion USD
articles.summary: Anthropic已秘密提交IPO申请，估值达9650亿美元，首次超越OpenAI的8520亿美元登顶行业第一。预计将在2026年下半年正式上市。
articles.summary_en: Anthropic has secretly filed for IPO, with valuation reaching 965 billion USD, surpassing OpenAI's 852 billion USD for the first time to become the industry's most valuable AI company. Expected to officially list in the second half of 2026.
articles.content: 据知情人士透露，AI安全公司Anthropic已秘密向美国证券交易委员会提交IPO申请，估值达9650亿美元，首次超越OpenAI的8520亿美元，成为全球估值最高的AI公司。Anthropic成立于2021年，由前OpenAI副总裁Dario Amodei创立，主打AI安全和对齐研究。其旗舰产品Claude系列在代码生成、长文本理解和安全对齐方面表现卓越。Anthropic在2025年底发布的Claude Fable 5在SWE-bench Pro上得分80.3%，领先GPT-5.5达22个百分点。此次IPO预计将在2026年下半年正式上市，有望成为AI行业最大规模的公开募股。
articles.content_en: According to informed sources, AI safety company Anthropic has secretly filed an IPO application with the US Securities and Exchange Commission, with valuation reaching 965 billion USD, surpassing OpenAI's 852 billion USD for the first time to become the world's most valuable AI company. Founded in 2021 by former OpenAI VP Dario Amodei, Anthropic focuses on AI safety and alignment research. Its flagship Claude series excels in code generation, long-text understanding, and safety alignment. Claude Fable 5, released at the end of 2025, scored 80.3% on SWE-bench Pro, leading GPT-5.5 by 22 percentage points. The IPO is expected to officially list in the second half of 2026, potentially becoming the largest public offering in the AI industry.
key_points: Anthropic秘密提交IPO申请
估值9650亿美元超越OpenAI
Claude Fable 5在SWE-bench领先22个百分点
预计2026年下半年正式上市
有望成为AI行业最大规模公开募股
key_points_en: Anthropic secretly filed IPO application
Valuation of 965B USD surpasses OpenAI
Claude Fable 5 leads SWE-bench by 22 percentage points
Expected to list officially in H2 2026
Could become largest AI industry public offering

articles.title: NVIDIA发布Nemotron 3 Ultra，5500亿参数最强美国开源模型
articles.title_en: NVIDIA Releases Nemotron 3 Ultra, 550B Parameter Strongest American Open Source Model
articles.summary: NVIDIA发布Nemotron 3 Ultra开源模型，5500亿参数成为美国最强开源大模型，在多项评测中超越Llama 4和Mistral Large，支持商用许可。
articles.summary_en: NVIDIA released the Nemotron 3 Ultra open source model, with 550 billion parameters becoming America's strongest open source LLM, surpassing Llama 4 and Mistral Large in multiple benchmarks, available under commercial license.
articles.content: NVIDIA正式发布Nemotron 3 Ultra开源大模型，5500亿参数规模使其成为目前美国最强的开源大模型。该模型在MMLU、GSM8K、HumanEval等多项主流评测中全面超越Meta的Llama 4和Mistral Large，特别是在数学推理和代码生成方面表现突出。Nemotron 3 Ultra采用NVIDIA自研的NeMo框架训练，使用了15万亿token的训练数据，支持128K上下文窗口。模型以NVIDIA开源许可协议发布，允许商业使用。NVIDIA表示，此举旨在推动AI生态系统的开放发展，与Google的Gemma和Meta的Llama形成三足鼎立的开源格局。
articles.content_en: NVIDIA officially released the Nemotron 3 Ultra open source LLM, with 550 billion parameters making it America's strongest open source model. The model comprehensively surpasses Meta's Llama 4 and Mistral Large across multiple mainstream benchmarks including MMLU, GSM8K, and HumanEval, with particularly outstanding performance in mathematical reasoning and code generation. Nemotron 3 Ultra was trained using NVIDIA's proprietary NeMo framework with 15 trillion tokens of training data, supporting a 128K context window. The model is released under NVIDIA's open source license allowing commercial use. NVIDIA stated this move aims to promote open development of the AI ecosystem, forming a tripartite open source landscape with Google's Gemma and Meta's Llama.
key_points: Nemotron 3 Ultra 5500亿参数美国最强开源
全面超越Llama 4和Mistral Large
15万亿token训练数据，128K上下文
支持商用许可
与Gemma、Llama三足鼎立
key_points_en: Nemotron 3 Ultra 550B parameters, America's strongest open source
Comprehensively surpasses Llama 4 and Mistral Large
15 trillion tokens training data, 128K context
Commercial use permitted
Tripartite landscape with Gemma and Llama

articles.title: 微软CEO警告AI巨头权力过度集中
articles.title_en: Microsoft CEO Warns of Excessive Power Concentration Among AI Giants
articles.summary: 微软CEO萨提亚·纳德拉公开警告AI行业权力过度集中的风险，呼吁建立更开放和多元化的AI生态，避免少数公司垄断AI基础能力。
articles.summary_en: Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella publicly warned about the risk of excessive power concentration in the AI industry, calling for a more open and diversified AI ecosystem to prevent a few companies from monopolizing fundamental AI capabilities.
articles.content: 微软CEO萨提亚·纳德拉在近期公开场合发出警告，指出AI行业正面临权力过度集中的风险。他表示，当前少数几家AI巨头掌握了算力、数据和人才的绝对优势，这种集中趋势可能抑制创新、推高价格，并最终损害消费者利益。纳德拉呼吁建立更开放和多元化的AI生态系统，通过开源模型、分布式算力和数据共享来降低行业准入门槛。他特别强调，微软将继续投资开源AI项目，支持中小型AI公司的发展。这一表态被业界解读为对OpenAI、Google等竞争对手的间接批评，也反映了微软在AI生态布局中的战略考量。
articles.content_en: Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella recently publicly warned about the risk of excessive power concentration in the AI industry. He stated that a few AI giants currently hold absolute advantages in computing power, data, and talent, and this concentration trend may suppress innovation, drive up prices, and ultimately harm consumer interests. Nadella called for building a more open and diversified AI ecosystem, lowering industry barriers through open source models, distributed computing, and data sharing. He specifically emphasized that Microsoft will continue investing in open source AI projects and supporting the development of small and medium-sized AI companies. This statement has been interpreted as indirect criticism of competitors like OpenAI and Google, reflecting Microsoft's strategic considerations in AI ecosystem positioning.
key_points: 纳德拉警告AI行业权力过度集中
少数巨头掌握算力、数据、人才绝对优势
呼吁建立开放多元化的AI生态
微软将继续投资开源AI项目
被解读为对OpenAI、Google的间接批评
key_points_en: Nadella warns of excessive power concentration in AI
A few giants hold absolute advantages in computing, data, talent
Calls for open and diversified AI ecosystem
Microsoft will continue investing in open source AI
Interpreted as indirect criticism of OpenAI and Google

articles.title: 31个省份差异化推进人工智能发展布局
articles.title_en: 31 Provinces Differentially Advance AI Development Layout
articles.summary: 全国31个省份已全部出台AI发展专项政策，根据各地产业基础和资源禀赋差异化布局，形成算力、数据、应用三大差异化发展路径。
articles.summary_en: All 31 provinces in China have issued AI development policies, with differentiated layouts based on local industrial bases and resource endowments, forming three differentiated development paths: computing power, data, and applications.
articles.content: 全国31个省份已全部出台人工智能发展专项政策，根据各地产业基础和资源禀赋进行差异化布局。整体来看，形成了三大差异化发展路径：一是以内蒙古、贵州、甘肃为代表的算力枢纽型省份，依托清洁能源和气候优势建设大型智算中心；二是以北京、上海、深圳为代表的技术引领型城市，聚焦大模型研发和前沿技术突破；三是以浙江、江苏、广东为代表的应用驱动型省份，推动AI在制造业、服务业的深度融合。工信部表示，差异化布局避免了同质化竞争和资源浪费，各地应发挥比较优势，形成全国AI发展的协同效应。同时，跨省算力调度和数据流通机制正在建设中。
articles.content_en: All 31 provinces in China have issued AI development policies, with differentiated layouts based on local industrial bases and resource endowments. Overall, three differentiated development paths have formed: first, computing hub provinces represented by Inner Mongolia, Guizhou, and Gansu, leveraging clean energy and climate advantages to build large AI computing centers; second, technology-leading cities represented by Beijing, Shanghai, and Shenzhen, focusing on LLM R&D and frontier technology breakthroughs; third, application-driven provinces represented by Zhejiang, Jiangsu, and Guangdong, promoting deep AI integration in manufacturing and services. The Ministry of Industry and Information Technology stated that differentiated layout avoids homogeneous competition and resource waste, and each region should leverage comparative advantages to form a national AI development synergy. Cross-province computing scheduling and data circulation mechanisms are also under construction.

形成算力枢纽、技术引领、应用驱动三大路径
避免同质化竞争和资源浪费
跨省算力调度和数据流通机制在建
工信部强调发挥比较优势形成协同效应
key_points_en: All 31 provinces issued AI development policies
Three paths: computing hubs, tech leadership, application-driven
Avoids homogeneous competition and resource waste
Cross-province computing scheduling under construction
MIIT emphasizes leveraging comparative advantages for synergy

articles.title: Flourish获5亿美元融资：贝佐斯谷歌VC押注大脑计算新范式
articles.title_en: Flourish Raises $500M: Bezos and Google GV Bet on Brain Computing Paradigm
articles.summary: 无产品、无营收、无论文，仅凭"逆向工程人脑"的前沿叙事，美国初创公司Flourish获得5亿美元融资，估值达25亿美元。投资方包括贝佐斯个人重仓、谷歌GV等顶级机构。
articles.summary_en: With no product, revenue, or published papers, US startup Flourish raised $500M at $2.5B valuation with backing from Jeff Bezos, Google GV, and other top VCs for its brain-computing research.
articles.content: 美国初创公司Flourish近日宣布获得5亿美元融资，投后估值达25亿美元，一举成为2026年AI硬科技赛道最破格的投资标的。这家成立仅数月的公司尚无产品落地、无营收数据、无公开论文，却获得了贝佐斯个人重仓、谷歌GV、Lux Capital、Catalio Capital等顶级机构的集体押注。Flourish的使命是「逆向工程人脑」，通过解析人脑皮层柱的底层运算规则，复刻生物大脑的稀疏、异步、低功耗计算模式。其打造的CortexAI目标是将通用AI系统的功耗压缩至20-50瓦，比肩人脑能耗水平，从根源上终结AI能耗危机。这一大胆愿景直击当前AI行业面临的两大核心挑战：训练推理的高能耗，以及模型难以持续学习的困境。资本市场此次押注的不仅是又一AI创业公司，更是一场从冯·诺依曼暴力计算向生物高效智能计算的范式切换。
articles.content_en: US startup Flourish has raised $500 million in funding at a $2.5 billion valuation, becoming the most unconventional AI investment of 2026. Despite having no products, revenue, or published papers, the company attracted backing from Jeff Bezos, Google GV, Lux Capital, and Catalio Capital. Flourish's mission is to 'reverse engineer the human brain' by analyzing cortical column operations to replicate the sparse, asynchronous, low-power computing patterns of biological brains. Their CortexAI aims to compress general AI system power consumption to 20-50 watts, matching human brain energy levels and fundamentally solving the AI energy crisis. This bold vision targets two core challenges: high energy consumption in training/inference and the inability of current models to learn continuously. The market is betting not just on another AI startup, but on a paradigm shift from Von Neumann brute-force computing to bio-efficient intelligent computing.
key_points: Flourish获5亿美元融资，估值25亿美元，投资方包括贝佐斯和谷歌GV
公司尚无产品落地，仅凭「逆向工程人脑」的前沿概念获得押注
目标打造CortexAI系统，功耗压缩至20-50瓦，比肩人脑能耗
直击AI行业两大困境：高能耗与无法持续学习
资本押注的是从暴力计算向生物智能的范式切换
key_points_en: Flourish raises $500M at $2.5B valuation, backed by Bezos and Google GV
No products yet, funding based on 'reverse engineer brain' concept
Aims to build CortexAI with 20-50W power consumption matching human brain
Targets AI's two major challenges: high energy consumption and continuous learning
Capital bets on paradigm shift from brute-force to bio-intelligent computing

articles.title: 智谱GLM-5.2登顶全球开源：7440亿参数、百万字上下文
articles.title_en: Zhipu's GLM-5.2 Tops Global Open-Source: 744B Parameters, 1M Context
articles.summary: 智谱AI发布GLM-5.2大模型，7440亿参数规模位居全球开源第一，支持百万字超长上下文，在Code Arena盲测中位列全球可用模型第一。
articles.summary_en: Zhipu AI released GLM-5.2 with 744B parameters, ranking first globally in open-source LLMs with 1M token context window, topping Code Arena rankings.
articles.content: 智谱AI于6月13日发布、6月17日全量开源GLM-5.2大模型，7440亿参数规模震惊业界，更令人惊叹的是采用MIT协议完全免费商用。GLM-5.2在Code Arena百万用户盲测中斩获全球可用模型第一的佳绩，代码能力SWE-Bench得分达62.1%，超越GPT-5.5。该模型完全在华为昇腾芯片上训练，实现了国产算力的里程碑突破，Day 0即适配8家国产芯片厂商。智谱独创的IndexShare技术将100万Token上下文的计算量压缩至短上下文的2.9倍，使超长上下文真正可用于生产环境。从2月的GLM-5到4月的GLM-5.1再到6月的GLM-5.2，智谱以四个月三版的高速迭代，展现了国产大模型的技术实力。配合18美元/月的Coding Plan，商业化路径清晰可见。
articles.content_en: Zhipu AI released and fully open-sourced GLM-5.2 on June 13-17, 2026, stunning the industry with 744 billion parameters under MIT license for free commercial use. GLM-5.2 achieved #1 ranking globally on Code Arena among available models, scoring 62.1% on SWE-bench, surpassing GPT-5.5. The model was trained entirely on Huawei Ascend chips, marking a milestone for domestic computing power with Day 0 adaptation to 8 domestic chip manufacturers. Zhipu's proprietary IndexShare technology compresses 1M token context computation to just 2.9x short context, making ultra-long context viable for production. From GLM-5 in February to GLM-5.1 in April and GLM-5.2 in June, Zhipu demonstrates rapid iteration speed and Chinese LLM technical prowess. With an $18/month Coding Plan, the commercialization path is clear.
key_points: 智谱GLM-5.2全量开源，7440亿参数，MIT协议完全免费商用
Code Arena盲测全球可用模型第一，代码能力超越GPT-5.5
完全在华为昇腾芯片训练，Day 0适配8家国产芯片厂商
IndexShare技术将100万上下文计算量压缩至2.9倍
四个月三版迭代，配合18美元/月Coding Plan商业化
key_points_en: Zhipu GLM-5.2 fully open-sourced with 744B parameters, MIT license free for commercial use
#1 globally on Code Arena, coding ability surpasses GPT-5.5
Trained entirely on Huawei Ascend chips, Day 0 adaptation to 8 domestic chip makers
IndexShare technology compresses 1M context computation to 2.9x
Three versions in four months, $18/month Coding Plan for commercialization

articles.title: AI算力新变局：CPU与GPU配比从1:8趋向1:1
articles.title_en: AI Compute Shift: CPU-GPU Ratio Evolves from 1:8 to 1:1
articles.summary: 智能体时代推动算力配比发生质变。英特尔至强服务器CPU供不应求，AMD将服务器CPU市场规模预测翻倍上调至1200亿美元，黄仁勋称"CPU是指挥家，GPU是乐团"。
articles.summary_en: The Agent era is reshaping compute ratios. Intel Xeon server CPUs are in short supply, AMD doubled its server CPU market forecast to $120B, as Jensen Huang calls 'CPU the conductor, GPU the orchestra'.
articles.content: AI算力格局正在发生深刻变革。随着智能体时代到来，AI工作负载从训练转向推理，CPU与GPU的配比关系正从传统的1:8向1:1甚至更高CPU占比转变。英特尔CEO陈立武在2026年Q1财报电话会议上指出，推理场景中CPU在任务编排、数据管理和控制调度方面具有独特优势，正成为算力架构中的关键一环。AMD将服务器CPU市场规模预测翻倍上调至1200亿美元，黄仁勋更是提出「CPU是指挥家，GPU是乐团」的经典比喻。行业数据显示，AI智能体时代每吉瓦所需的CPU核心数可能从3000万激增至1.2亿，增长4倍。这一结构性变化已引发供应链紧张，英特尔至强服务器CPU供不应求，AMD和英特尔双双上调部分CPU产品价格。GPU巨头英伟达和Arm也在今年3月宣布进军服务器CPU市场，AI军备竞赛的焦点正从GPU悄然转向CPU。
articles.content_en: The AI computing landscape is undergoing profound transformation. As the Agent era arrives with AI workloads shifting from training to inference, the CPU-to-GPU ratio is evolving from traditional 1:8 toward 1:1 or even higher CPU proportion. Intel CEO Lip-Bu Tan noted on Q1 2026 earnings call that CPUs hold unique advantages in task orchestration, data management, and control scheduling during inference, becoming a key component in computing architecture. AMD doubled its server CPU market forecast to $120 billion. Jensen Huang famously described 'CPU as conductor, GPU as orchestra.' Industry data shows AI agent era may require CPU cores per gigawatt to surge from 30 million to 120 million, a 4x increase. This structural shift has triggered supply crunch—Intel Xeon server CPUs are in short supply, while both AMD and Intel raised prices on certain CPU lines. GPU giants Nvidia and Arm announced entry into server CPU market in March 2026, shifting AI arms race focus from GPU to CPU.
key_points: AI工作负载从训练转向推理，CPU与GPU配比从1:8趋向1:1
英特尔CEO陈立武：推理时代CPU重要性显著提升
AMD将服务器CPU市场规模预测翻倍至1200亿美元
AI智能体时代每吉瓦CPU核心需求从3000万增至1.2亿
英伟达和Arm于2026年3月宣布进军服务器CPU市场
key_points_en: AI workloads shift from training to inference, CPU:GPU ratio evolving from 1:8 toward 1:1
Intel CEO: CPU importance significantly increases in inference era
AMD doubles server CPU market forecast to $120 billion
AI agent era requires CPU cores per GW surging from 30M to 120M
Nvidia and Arm announce entry into server CPU market in March 2026

articles.title: 八部门力推AI+消费：AI手机、AIPC、人形机器人纳入以旧换新
articles.title_en: 8 Departments Push AI+Consumption: AI Phones, AIPC, Humanoid Robots in Trade-In
articles.summary: 八部门联合推动"人工智能+消费"，AI手机、AIPC、人形机器人纳入以旧换新补贴，最高补贴1500元。工信部同步公开征求AI终端产品通用规范。
articles.summary_en: Eight government departments jointly promote AI+consumption with trade-in subsidies up to 1500 yuan for AI phones, AIPC, and humanoid robots. MIIT seeks public input on AI terminal standards.
articles.content: 商务部等八部门联合发布《关于加快「人工智能+消费」发展的实施意见》，正式将AI手机、AIPC、人形机器人纳入以旧换新补贴范围，最高补贴额度达1500元。政策围绕提升AI+商品消费、发展AI+服务消费、培育AI消费新业态等五方面提出17项举措。工信部同步公开征求AI终端产品通用规范意见，标志着政府对AI终端产品的标准化管理进入新阶段。政策明确要推动智能终端供给、人形机器人及全场景生态发展，覆盖养老、文旅等五大服务场景。这一政策组合拳旨在推动AI技术走进千家万户、进千商万店，加速AI技术在消费领域的规模化落地。
articles.content_en: China's Ministry of Commerce and seven other departments jointly issued 'Implementation Opinions on Accelerating AI+Consumption Development,' officially including AI phones, AIPC, and humanoid robots in trade-in subsidy programs with maximum subsidies up to 1,500 yuan. The policy proposes 17 measures across five areas including AI+product consumption, AI+service consumption, and cultivation of new AI consumption formats. The Ministry of Industry and Information Technology simultaneously sought public comments on AI terminal product standards, marking a new stage in government standardization management of AI terminal products. The policy explicitly promotes intelligent terminal supply, humanoid robots, and full-scenario ecosystem development, covering elderly care, cultural tourism, and four other service scenarios. This policy package aims to bring AI technology into thousands of households and businesses, accelerating large-scale AI deployment in the consumer sector.
key_points: 八部门联合推动AI+消费，AI手机、AIPC、人形机器人纳入以旧换新补贴
最高补贴1500元，覆盖商品消费、服务消费、新业态培育等五方面

Maximum subsidy 1,500 yuan, covering five areas including product/service consumption and new formats
MIIT seeks public comments on AI terminal product standards
Policy covers elderly care, cultural tourism, and four other service scenarios
Aims to bring AI into thousands of households and businesses

articles.title: 支付宝AI钱包正式推出：构建全栈AI支付解决方案
articles.title_en: Alipay AI Wallet Launches: Building Full-Stack AI Payment Solution
articles.summary: 支付宝正式推出AI钱包，整合AI帮抢、AI付、AI收等功能，用户可对智能体任务进行实时管理。新发布ACT协议2.0打造智能体商业信任底座。
articles.summary_en: Alipay officially launched its AI wallet with AI task management, combining AI Pay, AI Collect, and smart agent capabilities. The new ACT protocol 2.0 establishes the trust foundation for AI commerce.
articles.content: 支付宝正式推出AI钱包，标志着其全面拥抱AI技术的战略升级。新版AI钱包整合了AI帮抢、AI付、AI收等核心功能，用户可以对智能体任务进行实时管理和监控。值得关注的是，支付宝同期发布了ACT协议2.0（Agent Commercial Trust Protocol），旨在构建智能体商业信任底座，解决AI智能体在支付、交易等商业场景中的信任问题。该协议为智能体间的交易提供标准化信任验证机制，使AI智能体能够自主完成支付结算、资金流转等商业行为。支付宝AI钱包的推出不仅是支付方式的升级，更是支付宝从支付工具向AI服务平台转型的重要里程碑，预示着AI与支付、商业的深度融合将开辟全新的智能商业时代。
articles.content_en: Alipay officially launched its AI Wallet, marking a strategic upgrade embracing AI technology comprehensively. The new AI Wallet integrates core features including AI Grab, AI Pay, and AI Collect, enabling users to manage and monitor intelligent agent tasks in real-time. Notably, Alipay simultaneously released ACT Protocol 2.0 (Agent Commercial Trust Protocol), designed to build a trust foundation for intelligent agent commerce, addressing trust issues in AI agent payment and transaction scenarios. This protocol provides standardized trust verification mechanisms for inter-agent transactions, enabling AI agents to autonomously complete payments, settlements, and other commercial behaviors. The launch of Alipay AI Wallet represents not just an upgrade in payment methods, but a significant milestone in Alipay's transformation from payment tool to AI service platform, heralding a new era of deep integration between AI and commerce.
key_points: 支付宝AI钱包正式推出，整合AI帮抢、AI付、AI收等功能
用户可对智能体任务进行实时管理和监控
发布ACT协议2.0，构建智能体商业信任底座
解决AI智能体在支付、交易等商业场景中的信任问题

Users can manage and monitor intelligent agent tasks in real-time
Releases ACT Protocol 2.0 building trust foundation for agent commerce
Addresses trust issues in AI agent payment and transaction scenarios
Alipay strategic transformation from payment tool to AI service platform

articles.title: 工商银行AI数字员工承担工作量达5.5万人年
articles.title_en: ICBC AI Digital Employees Handle 55,000 Person-Years of Work
articles.summary: 金融监管总局发布银行业首份AI安全开发应用指导意见，工商银行AI数字员工已承担工作量达5.5万人年，AI应用正在重塑金融业劳动力结构。
articles.summary_en: Following China's first AI security guidance for banking, ICBC's AI digital employees now handle 55,000 person-years of workload, reshaping the financial sector workforce.
articles.content: 工商银行2025年年报显示，该行AI数字员工已承担工作量达5.5万人年，相当于5.5万名全职员工一年的工作量，这一数字震惊业界。2025年度工商银行信息科技投入金额达到285.88亿元，在六大国有大行中投入绝对金额最大。数智化转型已成为银行业的必答题，工行推动人工智能在30余个业务领域、500多个场景成功落地。金融监管总局同期发布银行业首份AI安全开发应用指导意见，标志着金融AI应用进入规范化发展新阶段。AI技术正在深刻重塑金融业劳动力结构，从简单的客服机器人到复杂的风险评估、投资决策，AI数字员工正承担起越来越多的关键业务职能。
articles.content_en: ICBC's 2025 annual report reveals its AI digital employees now handle workloads equivalent to 55,000 person-years, shocking the industry. ICBC's 2025 IT investment reached 28.588 billion yuan, the largest absolute amount among six major state-owned banks. Digital-intelligent transformation has become an imperative for banking—ICBC successfully deployed AI across over 30 business domains and 500+ scenarios. The National Financial Regulatory Administration simultaneously issued China's first AI security development guidelines for banking, marking a new stage of standardized development for financial AI applications. AI technology is profoundly reshaping the financial sector workforce structure. From simple customer service chatbots to complex risk assessment and investment decisions, AI digital employees are increasingly undertaking critical business functions.
key_points: 工商银行AI数字员工承担工作量达5.5万人年
2025年信息科技投入285.88亿元，六大行中绝对金额最大
AI已部署至30余个业务领域、500多个场景

AI技术正在深刻重塑金融业劳动力结构

articles.title: OpenAI GPT-5.6下周发布：150万token上下文、三项Agent能力
articles.title_en: OpenAI GPT-5.6 Coming Next Week: 1.5M Context, Three Agent Capabilities
articles.summary: OpenAI确认GPT-5.6系列将于6月22-28日发布，包含mini、标准版、Pro三档，上下文窗口扩展至150万token，新增视觉复刻代码、SVG 3D生成、Playwright自动化三项Agent能力。
articles.summary_en: OpenAI confirms GPT-5.6 series launching June 22-28 with mini, standard, and Pro tiers. Context window expands to 1.5M tokens with three new Agent capabilities: visual code replication, SVG 3D generation, and Playwright automation.
articles.content: OpenAI的GPT-5.6近日在Codex后端路由日志中被发现，代号iris-alpha，核心参数与能力信息首次曝光。上下文窗口从GPT-5.5的105万Token大幅扩展至150万Token，增幅达43%。开发者在OpenCode工具中实测显示，模型在输入达90万Token时仍能流畅响应。GPT-5.6采用双版本策略：标准版强化多步骤推理与长文本理解，Pro版则专为企业级Agent工作流设计，支持并行调度数百个子Agent。新增视觉复刻代码能力，可在零提示词条件下生成商用级前端界面；SVG 3D生成和Playwright自动化能力使开发效率大幅提升。代码能力SWE-Bench Pro得分达69.2%，可自动修复跨文件依赖冲突与版本兼容问题。Polymarket预测市场显示6月底前发布的概率高达80-89%，预示着GPT-5.6的正式发布已近在眼前。
articles.content_en: OpenAI's GPT-5.6 was recently discovered in Codex backend routing logs, codenamed iris-alpha, with core parameters and capabilities revealed. The context window expands dramatically from GPT-5.5's 1.05M to 1.5M tokens, a 43% increase. Developer tests in OpenCode tool show the model responds smoothly even at 900K token inputs. GPT-5.6 adopts a dual-version strategy: standard version enhances multi-step reasoning and long-text understanding, while Pro version is designed for enterprise Agent workflows supporting parallel scheduling of hundreds of sub-agents. New visual code replication capability generates commercial-grade frontend interfaces from zero prompts; SVG 3D generation and Playwright automation significantly improve development efficiency. Code capability achieves 69.2% on SWE-Bench Pro, automatically fixing cross-file dependency conflicts and version compatibility issues. Polymarket prediction markets show 80-89% probability of launch by end of June, signaling GPT-5.6's official release is imminent.

articles.title: 北京241款大模型居全国第一：AI+黑灯实验室落地
articles.title_en: Beijing Leads China with 241 LLMs: AI Dark Labs Deploy
articles.summary: 北京累计备案上线大模型241款，数量居全国首位。戴纳科技落地全国首个"AI+黑灯实验室"，每天最高可完成1万个实验的检测任务。
articles.summary_en: Beijing leads China with 241 registered LLMs. Dana Technologies deployed the nation's first 'AI Dark Lab' capable of conducting 10,000 experiments daily.
articles.content: 北京市人工智能产业发展传来重磅消息：截至2026年6月，北京累计备案上线大模型241款，数量居全国首位，全面展现「人工智能第一城」的风采。北京不仅在模型数量上领先，更在AI赋能科研方面取得突破性进展。戴纳科技落地的全国首个「AI+黑灯实验室」成为标志性成果，该实验室可实现完全无人、完全闭环、持续自动化运行，每天最高可完成1万个实验的检测任务。「一天顶一年」——AI+黑灯实验室工作一天的效率，相当于一线科研人员工作一年。这不仅将科研人员从繁琐、重复的实验操作中解放出来，更以高质量数据为AI时代储备「数字石油」。北京正加速推动AI从「会聊天」向「会干活」转变，从知识服务向任务执行进化。
articles.content_en: Beijing announced a major achievement in AI industry development: as of June 2026, Beijing has registered and launched 241 LLMs, ranking #1 nationally and fully demonstrating its status as the 'AI First City.' Beijing leads not only in model quantity but also in breakthroughs in AI for Science. Dana Technologies' deployment of the nation's first 'AI+ Dark Lab' has become a landmark achievement. The lab operates fully unmanned, completely closed-loop, and continuously automated, capable of conducting up to 10,000 experiments daily. 'One day equals one year'—the AI Dark Lab's one day of work equals a front-line researcher's one year. This not only frees researchers from tedious, repetitive experimental operations but also reserves 'digital oil' for the AI era through high-quality data. Beijing is accelerating AI's transformation from 'can chat' to 'can work,' from knowledge services to task execution.
key_points: 北京累计备案上线大模型241款，数量居全国首位
戴纳科技落地全国首个AI+黑灯实验室
黑灯实验室每天最高可完成1万个实验检测任务
工作一天相当于一线科研人员工作一年
北京推动AI从「会聊天」向「会干活」转变

Dana Technologies deploys nation's first AI+ Dark Lab
Dark Lab can conduct up to 10,000 experiments daily
One day of lab work equals one year of researcher work
Beijing driving AI transformation from 'can chat' to 'can work'

articles.title: AI大模型企业冲刺科创板：估值逻辑从参数转向营收
articles.title_en: AI LLM Firms Sprint to STAR Market: Valuation Shifts from Parameters to Revenue
articles.summary: 证监会正式将AI大模型企业纳入科创板第五套上市标准。摩根大通预测2026年中国主要LLM年度经常性收入将增长4-7倍，估值逻辑正从"比拼参数"转向"营收客户"。
articles.summary_en: China's CSRC officially included AI LLM firms in STAR Market's fifth listing standard. JPM predicts China's major LLMs will see 4-7x ARR growth in 2026, as valuation logic shifts from parameters to revenue.
articles.content: AI大模型企业冲刺科创板的热潮正在兴起，估值逻辑正从「比拼参数」转向「营收客户」。6月17日，证监会主席吴清在陆家嘴论坛上宣布将科创板第五套上市标准的适用范围扩大至人工智能大模型行业，同日上交所发布具体审核指引。摩根大通预测2026年中国主要LLM的年度经常性收入（ARR）将增长4-7倍。智谱AI已启动回A进程，拟在科创板募资150亿元；MiniMax也于5月29日与中信证券签署辅导协议，正式启动科创板IPO。科创板第五套标准核心门槛为：预计市值不低于40亿元，不设营收和盈利要求，但要求至少有一个大模型产品完成上线发布并实现规模化应用。这一政策标志着中国AI大模型企业资本化通道正式打开，估值体系正从技术导向转向商业验证。
articles.content_en: A wave of AI LLM companies is sprinting toward China's STAR Market, with valuation logic shifting from 'competing on parameters' to 'revenue and customers.' On June 17, CSRC Chairman Wu Qing announced at the Lujiazui Forum the expansion of STAR Market's fifth listing standard to AI LLM industry, with Shanghai Stock Exchange releasing specific review guidelines the same day. JPMorgan predicts China's major LLMs will see 4-7x ARR growth in 2026. Zhipu AI has initiated its return-to-A-share process, planning to raise 15 billion yuan on STAR Market; MiniMax signed tutoring agreement with CITIC Securities on May 29, officially starting STAR Market IPO. Core thresholds for STAR Market fifth standard: expected market cap no less than 4 billion yuan, no revenue or profit requirements, but requiring at least one LLM product launched and achieving large-scale application. This policy marks the official opening of China's AI LLM enterprise capitalization channel, with valuation system shifting from technology-oriented to commercial validation.
key_points: 证监会将科创板第五套标准扩大至AI大模型行业
摩根大通预测2026年中国主要LLM的ARR将增长4-7倍
智谱AI拟在科创板募资150亿元，MiniMax启动IPO辅导
科创板第五套标准：市值不低于40亿元，不设盈利要求
估值逻辑从「比拼参数」转向「营收客户」
key_points_en: CSRC expands STAR Market fifth standard to AI LLM industry
JPMorgan predicts 4-7x ARR growth for China's major LLMs in 2026
Zhipu plans 15B yuan STAR Market raise, MiniMax starts IPO tutoring
STAR Market fifth standard: market cap 4B+ yuan, no profit requirement
Valuation logic shifts from 'competing on parameters' to 'revenue and customers'

articles.title: 英矽智能AI驱动创新药进入III期临床：仅耗时18个月
articles.title_en: Insilico AI Drug Enters Phase III: Achieved in Just 18 Months
articles.summary: 英矽智能宣布其全球首个AI驱动创新药进入III期临床试验，从靶点发现到临床仅耗时18个月，标志着AI药物研发进入新纪元。
articles.summary_en: Insilico Medicine announced its globally first AI-driven innovative drug entered Phase III clinical trials, achieving the milestone from target discovery to clinic in just 18 months.
articles.content: 英矽智能宣布其AI驱动创新药Rentosertib即将启动III期临床试验，成为全球首个进入III期临床的AI全程参与发现靶点、设计分子结构的创新药。从靶点发现到临床仅耗时18个月，创造了药物研发史上的奇迹。Rentosertib针对特发性肺纤维化（IPF），一种进展缓慢但预后较差的慢性肺部疾病。试验阵容豪华：由北京协和医院主任医师徐作军担任牵头研究者，中国工程院院士钟南山、上海市肺科医院院长陈昶担任联合牵头研究者。英矽智能利用自研Pharma.AI平台，将临床前候选药物提名周期从传统的2.5至4年缩短至平均12至18个月。目前公司已提名30个人工智能驱动发现的临床前候选化合物，其中13个已获批进入临床试验。英矽智能于2025年底在港交所上市，成为中国「AI制药第一股」。
articles.content_en: Insilico Medicine announced its AI-driven innovative drug Rentosertib will initiate Phase III clinical trials, becoming the world's first AI全程参与 discovered and designed innovative drug to enter Phase III. From target discovery to clinic in just 18 months, creating a miracle in drug development history. Rentosertib targets idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis (IPF), a slowly progressing chronic lung disease with poor prognosis. The trial lineup is prestigious: led by Dr. Xu Zuojun from Peking Union Medical College Hospital, with Academician Zhong Nanshan and Hospital Director Chen Chang as co-leading researchers. Insilico Medicine uses its proprietary Pharma.AI platform to shorten preclinical candidate nomination from traditional 2.5-4 years to average 12-18 months. The company has nominated 30 AI-driven preclinical candidates, with 13 approved for clinical trials. Insilico Medicine listed on Hong Kong Stock Exchange in late 2025, becoming China's 'first AI pharma stock.'
key_points: 英矽智能Rentosertib成为全球首个进入III期临床的AI全程参与创新药
从靶点发现到临床仅耗时18个月
钟南山院士担任联合牵头研究者，阵容豪华
Pharma.AI平台将药物研发周期从2.5-4年缩短至12-18个月
公司已提名30个AI驱动候选化合物，13个进入临床试验
key_points_en: Insilico's Rentosertib becomes world's first AI全程参与 innovative drug in Phase III
From target discovery to clinic in just 18 months
Academician Zhong Nanshan serves as co-leading researcher
Pharma.AI platform shortens drug development from 2.5-4 years to 12-18 months
Company nominated 30 AI-driven candidates, 13 entered clinical trials

hero.title: Flourish获5亿美元融资：贝佐斯谷歌VC押注大脑计算新范式
hero.summary: 无产品、无营收、无论文，仅凭"逆向工程人脑"的前沿叙事，美国初创公司Flourish获得5亿美元融资，估值达25亿美元。投资方包括贝佐斯个人重仓、谷歌GV等顶级机构。
hero.summary_en: With no product, revenue, or published papers, US startup Flourish raised $500M at $2.5B valuation with backing from Jeff Bezos, Google GV, and other top VCs for its brain-computing research.
hero.title_en: Flourish Raises $500M: Bezos and Google GV Bet on Brain Computing Paradigm
hero.content: 美国初创公司Flourish近日宣布获得5亿美元融资，投后估值达25亿美元，一举成为2026年AI硬科技赛道最破格的投资标的。这家成立仅数月的公司尚无产品落地、无营收数据、无公开论文，却获得了贝佐斯个人重仓、谷歌GV、Lux Capital、Catalio Capital等顶级机构的集体押注。Flourish的使命是「逆向工程人脑」，通过解析人脑皮层柱的底层运算规则，复刻生物大脑的稀疏、异步、低功耗计算模式。其打造的CortexAI目标是将通用AI系统的功耗压缩至20-50瓦，比肩人脑能耗水平，从根源上终结AI能耗危机。这一大胆愿景直击当前AI行业面临的两大核心挑战：训练推理的高能耗，以及模型难以持续学习的困境。资本市场此次押注的不仅是又一AI创业公司，更是一场从冯·诺依曼暴力计算向生物高效智能计算的范式切换。
hero.content_en: US startup Flourish has raised $500 million in funding at a $2.5 billion valuation, becoming the most unconventional AI investment of 2026. Despite having no products, revenue, or published papers, the company attracted backing from Jeff Bezos, Google GV, Lux Capital, and Catalio Capital. Flourish's mission is to 'reverse engineer the human brain' by analyzing cortical column operations to replicate the sparse, asynchronous, low-power computing patterns of biological brains. Their CortexAI aims to compress general AI system power consumption to 20-50 watts, matching human brain energy levels and fundamentally solving the AI energy crisis. This bold vision targets two core challenges: high energy consumption in training/inference and the inability of current models to learn continuously. The market is betting not just on another AI startup, but on a paradigm shift from Von Neumann brute-force computing to bio-efficient intelligent computing.
key_points: Flourish获5亿美元融资，估值25亿美元，投资方包括贝佐斯和谷歌GV
公司尚无产品落地，仅凭「逆向工程人脑」的前沿概念获得押注
目标打造CortexAI系统，功耗压缩至20-50瓦，比肩人脑能耗
直击AI行业两大困境：高能耗与无法持续学习
资本押注的是从暴力计算向生物智能的范式切换
key_points_en: Flourish raises $500M at $2.5B valuation, backed by Bezos and Google GV
No products yet, funding based on 'reverse engineer brain' concept
Aims to build CortexAI with 20-50W power consumption matching human brain
Targets AI's two major challenges: high energy consumption and continuous learning
Capital bets on paradigm shift from brute-force to bio-intelligent computing

hero.title: DeepSeek完成74亿美元A轮融资：史上最大中国AI单轮融资诞生
hero.summary: DeepSeek完成成立以来首轮外部融资，总金额超过74亿美元，投后估值520-590亿美元，创始人梁文锋个人出资28亿美元跟投，保持绝对控制权。这是中国AI行业迄今为止最大的单轮融资。
hero.summary_en: DeepSeek completed its first external funding round of over $7.4 billion, with a post-money valuation of $520-590 billion. Founder Liang Wenfeng personally invested $2.8 billion to maintain control. This is the largest single funding round in China's AI industry history.
hero.title_en: DeepSeek Raises $7.4B in Largest Ever Chinese AI Funding Round
key_points: 创始人绝对控制权设计：外部投资者仅获经济权益、无投票权
估值对标Anthropic，达国际一线水平
资金用途指向算力基础设施建设和人才招募
梁文锋跟投28亿美元彰显信心
hero.content:
DeepSeek完成成立以来首轮外部融资，总金额超过74亿美元，投后估值达520-590亿美元。本轮融资由腾讯领投约100亿元，宁德时代出资50亿元，网易、京东各30亿元。创始人梁文锋个人出资约28亿美元跟投，外部投资者仅获经济权益、不享有投票权。这一融资规模创下中国AI行业史上最大单轮融资纪录，估值已接近国际一线AI公司水平。

本轮融资采用独特的「有限合伙控制结构」：投资者资金注入梁文锋管理的有限合伙平台，股权设有五年锁定期。这一架构设计确保创始团队保持绝对控制权，体现了资本市场对DeepSeek技术路线的高度认可。

融资资金将主要用于算力基础设施建设和大模型人才招募。DeepSeek此前以「价格屠夫」著称，API价格比OpenAI便宜一半还多。完成融资后，如何平衡投资人回报预期与低价策略将是一大看点。
hero.content_en:
DeepSeek completed its first external funding round of over $7.4 billion, reaching a post-money valuation of $520-590 billion. This round was led by Tencent (~10B yuan), with CATL investing ~5B yuan, and NetEase and JD.com each investing ~3B yuan. Founder Liang Wenfeng personally invested ~2.8 billion to maintain absolute control, as external investors received economic rights only without voting rights.

This funding sets a record for the largest single funding round in China's AI industry, with valuation approaching international top-tier AI companies. The funding will primarily be used for computing infrastructure and talent recruitment.
key_points_en: Record $7.4B funding round, largest in China AI history
Tencent leads, CATL and NetEase among major investors
Founder maintains absolute control through unique structure
Valuation approaches international AI leaders like Anthropic
Funds targeting computing infrastructure and talent
